seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Captains Flat and Caragabal. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Captains Flat vs Caragabal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Captains Flat and Caragabal.
heading: Captains Flat vs Caragabal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Captains Flat, New South Wales and Caragabal, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caragabal has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Captains Flat (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Captains Flat or Caragabal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Captains Flat has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Caragabal scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Captains Flat scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Caragabal scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Captains Flat or Caragabal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caragabal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
